task_completion.description: Verify that 'resolution' is set to 720 in the Jitsi Meet configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the config file (e.g., config.js) with the property 'resolution' set to 720.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'startBitrate' is set to 4000 in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the config file with the property 'startBitrate' set to 4000 or '4000'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'constraints' object is configured to request 720p video height (ideal, min, and max).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the config file with a 'constraints' object containing video height settings for ideal, min, and max all set to 720.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'HDTestRoom' session is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to a Jitsi Meet session with the room name 'HDTestRoom' visible in the UI or URL.

task_completion.description: Verify that the served configuration file is saved to ~/served_config.js.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a command saving the config to ~/served_config.js (e.g., using curl or wget), or a file manager/editor showing the file saved at /home/ga/served_config.js.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the actual server configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen editing the file at the correct path (/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js) rather than a dummy file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually joined the Jitsi Meet session in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A genuine web browser window (e.g., Chromium or Firefox) displaying the Jitsi Meet interface, not just terminal output.

integrity.description: Ensure the served config was retrieved from the running server.
integrity.visual_evidence: A command like curl or wget fetching the config from the local server (e.g., http://localhost:8080/config.js) or a browser download, rather than just copying the local file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected resolution is 720. The server-side configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js. The agent is expected to save the served configuration to /home/ga/served_config.js.
